Barcelona · 2026

BrianMejía

Healthcare data professional with hands-on health plan experience — translating ACA enrollment, claims workflows, and compliance data into dashboards, KPIs, and actionable insights that help organizations improve outcomes and operate more efficiently.

United States  /  Barcelona, Spain
01 — About Me

The data professional
behind the work

I'm a Dominican-American healthcare professional focused on improving patient access and healthcare operations through digital innovation and data-driven solutions.

Before healthcare, I worked around professional baseball — supporting athlete services and learning the value of discipline, teamwork, and operating in high-performance environments. Those lessons shape how I approach complex systems today.

My experience spans ACA health plan enrollment, prescription assistance programs, and multi-state compliance operations — supporting over 1,000 individuals in accessing coverage while building digital workflow tools that streamline healthcare processes.

I'm currently pursuing a Master's in Digital Healthcare at the Universitat de Barcelona in collaboration with Barcelona Technology School, focused on health analytics, digital transformation, and technology-enabled care models — with a global perspective on building solutions that make care more accessible, efficient, and human.

04 — Expertise

Skills & Competencies

Core Competencies
Healthcare Operations
ACA enrollment, multi-state compliance, prescription assistance, and insurance navigation across complex health plan environments.
Data Analysis & Reporting
Aggregating, cleaning, and validating multi-source datasets — turning raw data into dashboards, KPIs, and actionable insights for leadership.
Sales & Client Advisory
Consulted and enrolled 1,000+ individuals into health coverage — combining product knowledge, needs assessment, and persuasive communication to drive outcomes.
Digital Workflow Design
Built web-based tools that standardize operational processes, reduce errors, and improve team performance — translating complex workflows into clean digital experiences.
Stakeholder Communication
Bilingual (EN/ES) communicator skilled at presenting data insights, facilitating discussions, and tailoring messages across clinical, operational, and executive audiences.
Performance Measurement
Defining KPIs, building benchmarks, and deploying reporting systems that give organizations a clear picture of what's working and where to improve.

05 — Projects

Selected Projects

01

ACA Enrollment Compliance & Reporting Workflow Tool

Built for Top Quality Coverage — a web-based operational tool that standardized agent workflows across compliance disclosures, objection handling, and plan enrollment steps. Functioned as a real-time performance measurement system — improving call consistency, reducing compliance errors, and generating structured data for reporting and agent benchmarking.

Workflow DesignPerformance MeasurementCompliance ReportingKPI BenchmarkingHTML / CSS
2026
Live
02

mHealth Integration Strategy — Hospital de la Santa Creu i Sant Pau

Exploring how Hospital de la Santa Creu i Sant Pau can move mobile health apps from one-off pilots into standard care for heart-failure patients — making digital tools a routine part of treatment to improve patient outcomes and reduce unplanned hospital readmissions.

Population HealthMember AdherenceKPI FrameworkROI AnalysismHealth
2025–Present
In Progress
03

Insurance Denial Pattern Dashboard

End-to-end analytics project aggregating CMS Medicare claims data to surface denial patterns by payer, claim type, and reason code. Built a multi-source dataset pipeline covering data cleaning, validation, and benchmarking — then deployed an interactive dashboard with KPIs tracking denial rates, appeal win rates, and turnaround times. Designed to give operations and quality teams a single source of truth for identifying high-impact process improvement opportunities.

KPI DevelopmentDashboard DeploymentCMS Claims DataData ValidationPythonTableau
2026
Ongoing
Recognition

Awards

HealthCare.gov · Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services
Elite Plus Dec 2023

Elite Plus Circle of Champions

Awarded to the top-performing Marketplace agents and brokers in America. Earned by helping at least 500 consumers enroll in ACA Marketplace coverage — placing among an elite tier of agents nationally recognized by HealthCare.gov for exceptional enrollment impact.

HealthCare.gov · Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services
CMS Award Feb 2024

Connecting Consumers with Coverage Award

Issued by the Director of CCIIO for helping consumers transition from Medicaid and CHIP coverage to the Health Insurance Marketplace between February 2023 and July 2024 — during the largest insurance unwinding event in U.S. history following the end of continuous Medicaid enrollment.
